'''Zardra Vykas''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the sister of [[Zarandro Vykas]]. She traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in her modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] freighter, the [[Firebrand (starship)|''Firebrand'']].
